name: gem-swarm
description: Multi-agent orchestration — 19 domain specialists, 37 skills, native parallel subagents, persistent sessions, autonomous 4-phase workflow

settings.name: Disabled Agents
settings.description: Comma-separated list of agent names to exclude from planning.

settings.name: Max Retries
settings.description: Maximum retry attempts per phase before escalating to user.

settings.name: Auto Archive
settings.description: Automatically archive session state on successful completion (true/false).

settings.name: State Directory
settings.description: Base directory for session state and plans (default: docs/gem-swarm).

settings.name: Max Concurrent
settings.description: Maximum subagents in one native parallel batch (0 = full batch).
